name: Nautilus
description:
The Patek Philippe Nautilus is the undisputed holy grail of modern watchmaking. Designed by the same Gerald Genta who created the Royal Oak, the Nautilus was Patek's 1976 answer to the integrated sports watch — and it redefined what a luxury steel watch could be.

The signature porthole-shaped case, horizontally embossed blue dial, and integrated bracelet create one of the most harmonious designs in the history of horology. In recent years, waiting lists for new Nautilus watches stretched to a decade at authorized dealers. At Artemis, availability is immediate. This is the piece that watch enthusiasts spend years trying to acquire. The blue dial is the reference — the one that started it all.
descriptionShort: The holy grail. Patek Nautilus blue dial — the most coveted steel sports watch in the world.
keyPoints: The most coveted steel sports watch ever created
Porthole-shaped case — Gerald Genta's second masterpiece
Horizontally embossed blue 'Clous de Paris' dial
Decade-long waiting lists at authorized dealers
Available immediately at Artemis — no waiting
seoTitle: Patek Philippe Nautilus Blue Dial | Artemis Watches Montreal
seoDescription: Shop the Patek Philippe Nautilus (Blue Dial) at Artemis — Montreal's premier luxury watch destination. Premium range, 30-day guarantee, free shipping. $1,500 CAD.
